title: orchis × colemanii nothosubsp. colemanii
intro: Orchis × colemanii nothosubsp. colemanii, also known as Coleman's hybrid orchid, is a hybrid orchid species created by crossing two species of orchids, Orchis italica and Orchis mascula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as a diuretic and to treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of anthraquinones. The health benefits of Orchis × colemanii nothosubsp. colemanii include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, reduce inflammation, and promote digestion. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
